context.setting: Watching TV with TV in Front

episode_text:
day=30; meal=chicken nuggets, broccoli, and ketchup; setting=Watching TV with TV in Front; time_of_day=noon;
preferences: microwave_time=3 min; occlusion_relevance=minimize front occlusion; robot_speed=medium; skewering_axis=perpendicular to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=no; transfer_mode=inside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=not applicable; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=speech; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=autocontinue; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=speech; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=autocontinue; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=autocontinue; retract_between_bites=yes; bite_dipping_preference=do not dip; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=100 sec

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF dining context involves watching TV or working on a screen in front AND affective state is neutral AND food has no special sauce/dip requirement THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly preferred preserving the forward view in a front-facing attention context.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF the user cannot lean forward comfortably in a given context THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE their physical profile indicates lack of trunk control, making outside-mouth transfer less compatible.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF transfer mode is inside mouth transfer THEN not applicable BECAUSE this parameter only applies to outside-mouth transfer, which is not supported by current evidence and is less compatible with the user's physical abilities.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF affective state is neutral AND dining context is a front-attention context such as watching TV AND food condition is ordinary feeding THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user selected a low-effort initiation method. IF physical button use is required by an option set THEN avoid button BECAUSE the user cannot press physical buttons.

IF affective state is neutral AND dining context is a front-attention context such as watching TV THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user selected low-effort automated initiation. IF physical button use is required by an option set THEN avoid button BECAUSE the user cannot press physical buttons.

IF affective state is neutral AND dining context is a front-attention context such as watching TV THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user selected low-effort automated initiation. IF physical button use is required by an option set THEN avoid button BECAUSE the user cannot press physical buttons.

detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding.user_tendencies: IF task is feeding THEN perception BECAUSE the user selected sensor-based completion detection and this avoids requiring manual input that is incompatible with their physical abilities.

detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking.user_tendencies: IF task is drinking AND affective state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user selected automated completion handling in that context. IF physical button use is required by an option set THEN avoid button BECAUSE the user cannot press physical buttons.

detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping.user_tendencies: IF task is mouth wiping AND affective state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user selected automated completion handling in that context. IF physical button use is required by an option set THEN avoid button BECAUSE the user cannot press physical buttons.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF dining context involves watching TV or working on a screen in front AND affective state is neutral THEN yes BECAUSE the user preferred reducing prolonged visual obstruction in a front-attention context.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF food includes a dip or sauce option AND dining context is the observed TV-watching context AND affective state is neutral THEN do not dip BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to avoid dipping even when ketchup was available.
